page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and network interfaces with a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.r7.6xlarge demonstrates solid mid-range performance. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1534.0 and a multi-core score of 11384.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 29229.28. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only large block bandwidth of 129.12 GB/sec and a write bandwidth of 62.93 GB/sec. The processor's support for AVX-512 and vector neural network instructions (AVX512_VNNI) aids in workloads like small-scale machine learning, where it achieves a strong text generation speed of 283.7 tokens/second on a 135M parameter LLM, though performance drops to 14.18 tokens/second on a larger 7B model.

Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading, this instance offers a balanced cost-to-resource profile for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage. The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly suitable for hosting relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis (which benchmarked at 23.5 million operations per second), enterprise applications, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, but lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Network connectivity is delivered via a 12 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 11384.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 29229.28. However, it shows strong capabilities in lightweight LLM text generation, reaching 283.7 tokens/second on a 135M model. With its high memory density and dedicated compute resources, the ecs.r7.6xlarge is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads such as database hosting, Redis caching, and enterprise application deployments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for database and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.6xlarge features 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 192 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A dedicated Intel-powered instance offering high memory density and balanced compute performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

192.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong performance in lightweight LLM text generation
Optimized for relational databases, Redis caching, and enterprise apps
